scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/web run lint && python -m compileall -q apps/api/app
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck && python -m compileall -q apps/api/app
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/web run test && python -m unittest discover -s apps/api/tests -p "test_*.py" -v
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/web run build && python -m compileall -q apps/api/app
